languages.text: {n}Безумец стреляет быстро и профессионально, не задумываясь. Благодаря вашей реакции смертельный плевок плазмы прожигает импланты техножреца левее, чем планировалось — падая на пол, он хватается за бок, и его руки моментально заливает черно-алым.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Безумец стреляет быстро и профессионально, не задумываясь. Благодаря вашей реакции смертельный плевок плазмы прожигает импланты техножреца левее, чем планировалось — падая на пол, он хватается за голову, и его руки моментально заливает черно-алым.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The madman fires quickly and expertly, without hesitation. But thanks to your quick reflexes, the deadly plasma blast hits the Tech-Priest's implants to the left of where he was aiming. The robed man falls to the floor, clutching at his side, and his hands are instantly covered in black and crimson.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Безумец стреляет быстро и профессионально, не задумываясь. Благодаря вашей реакции смертельный плевок плазмы прожигает импланты техножреца левее, чем планировалось — падая на пол, он хватается за бок, и его руки моментально заливает черно-алым.{/n}

The robed man falls to the floor, clutching at his side, and his hands are instantly drenched in black and crimson.{/n}

The robed man falls to the floor, clutching at his side, and his hands are instantly covered in black and crimson.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Wahnsinnige feuert schnell und ohne zu zögern. Dank deiner schnellen Reflexe trifft das tödliche Plasma die Implantate des Techpriesters links neben seinem eigentlichen Ziel. Der in eine Robe gehüllte Mann geht zu Boden und fasst sich an die Seite. Seine Hände sind sofort schwarz und rot verschmiert.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The madman fires quickly and expertly, without hesitation. But thanks to your quick reflexes, the deadly plasma blast hits the Tech-Priest's implants to the left of where he was aiming. The robed man falls to the floor, clutching at his side, and his hands are instantly covered in black and crimson.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Wahnsinnige feuert schnell und ohne zu zögern. Dank deiner schnellen Reflexe trifft das tödliche Plasma die Implantate des Techpriesters links neben seinem eigentlichen Ziel. Der in eine Robe gehüllte Mann geht zu Boden und fasst sich an die Seite. Seine Hände sind sofort schwarz und rot verschmiert.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Avec une grande maîtrise de lui-même et sans faire montre de la moindre hésitation, l'homme tire en rafale. Mais c'était sans compter sur vos réflexes fulgurants ; le tir de plasma frappe les implants du technoprêtre à gauche de là où il visait. L'homme en robe s'effondre en se tenant le flanc, et très vite, ses mains se couvrent de noir et de rouge.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The madman fires quickly and expertly, without hesitation. But thanks to your quick reflexes, the deadly plasma blast hits the Tech-Priest's implants to the left of where he was aiming. The robed man falls to the floor, clutching at his side, and his hands are instantly covered in black and crimson.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Avec une grande maîtrise de lui-même et sans faire montre de la moindre hésitation, l'homme tire en rafale. Mais c'était sans compter sur vos réflexes fulgurants ; le tir de plasma frappe les implants du technoprêtre à gauche de là où il visait. L'homme en robe s'effondre en se tenant le flanc, et très vite, ses mains se couvrent de noir et de rouge.{/n}

languages.text: {n}那疯子迅速开火，手法专业，毫不迟疑。多亏你反应快，致命的等离子束击中了技术神甫身体左侧的植入物，他瞄点稍左的位置。身着长袍的技术神甫捂着肋部倒地，双手瞬间被黑红的血迹染透。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The madman fires quickly and expertly, without hesitation. But thanks to your quick reflexes, the deadly plasma blast hits the Tech-Priest's implants to the left of where he was aiming. The robed man falls to the floor, clutching at his side, and his hands are instantly covered in black and crimson.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}那疯子迅速开火，手法专业，毫不迟疑。多亏你反应快，致命的等离子束击中了技术神甫身体左侧的植入物，他瞄点稍左的位置。身着长袍的技术神甫捂着肋部倒地，双手瞬间被黑红的血迹染透。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El lunático dispara de forma rápida y sin titubeos, pero, gracias a tus reflejos, el letal proyectil de plasma solo alcanza los implantes del tecnosacerdote, a la izquierda de donde apuntaba. El sacerdote cae al suelo, sujetándose el costado con manos que se tiñen al instante de negro y carmesí.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The madman fires quickly and expertly, without hesitation. But thanks to your quick reflexes, the deadly plasma blast hits the Tech-Priest's implants to the left of where he was aiming. The robed man falls to the floor, clutching at his side, and his hands are instantly covered in black and crimson.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El lunático dispara de forma rápida y sin titubeos, pero, gracias a tus reflejos, el letal proyectil de plasma solo alcanza los implantes del tecnosacerdote, a la izquierda de donde apuntaba. El sacerdote cae al suelo, sujetándose el costado con manos que se tiñen al instante de negro y carmesí.{/n}

languages.text: {n}狂人はためらうことなく、素早く巧みに発砲する。あなたの素早い反射神経のおかげで、致命的なプラズマの爆風がテック・プリーストのインプラントに命中した。ローブを着た男は脇腹を押さえて床に倒れ、その手は一瞬にして黒と深紅に染まる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The madman fires quickly and expertly, with no hesitation. Thanks to your quick reflexes, the deadly plasma blast hits the Tech-Priest's implants to the left of where he was aiming. The robed man falls to the floor, clutching at his side, and his hands are instantly drenched in black and crimson.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deli adam; hızlı ve ustaca, hiç tereddüt etmeden ateş ediyor. Ancak hızlı reflekslerin sayesinde ölümcül plazma patlaması, Tekno Rahip'in nişan aldığı yerin solundaki implantlarına isabet ediyor. Cübbeli adam, böğrünü tutarak yere düşüyor. Elleri anında siyahla kızıla bulanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The madman fires quickly and expertly, without hesitation. But thanks to your quick reflexes, the deadly plasma blast hits the Tech-Priest's implants to the left of where he was aiming. The robed man falls to the floor, clutching at his side, and his hands are instantly covered in black and crimson.{/n}

Elleri anında siyahla kızıla bulanıyor.{/n}
